faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Standard shipping takes 3–5 business days. Express shipping is available at checkout.
faq.a2: Yes! We offer a hassle-free 30-day return policy on all products.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide.
faq.q4: How do I track my order?
faq.a4: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking number.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, shipping address, and payment information when you make a purchase. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our services.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.body: We use the information we collect to process transactions, send order confirmations and updates, respond to your comments and questions, send marketing communications (with your consent), and improve our services.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except to trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website, such as payment processors and shipping providers.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site traffic, and understand where our visitors are coming from. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings.

security.title: Security
security.body: We implement a variety of security measures to protect your personal information. Your payment information is encrypted using SSL technology.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, update, or delete the personal information we hold about you. Contact us at privacy@shopella.com to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@shopella.com or write to us at 123 Commerce Street, New York, NY 10001.
